questions: Does brand marketing drive sales ROI?
qa.answer: Brand investment builds base demand and pricing power, lifting overall ROI including performance campaigns. Over‑indexing on lower‑funnel alone limits long‑term growth and erodes efficiency over time.
implication: Maintain brand investment floors; track pricing power and base sales in MMM.
Use a balanced mix and monitor diminishing returns in lower‑funnel.
Tie brand KPIs to financials to protect spend through cycles.
